name: Edinburgh

salary.role: Agile Project Manager / Scrum Master (national average)

industries: Asset management, insurance and pensions dominate, with fintech and devolved-government digital programmes growing fast.
intro: Edinburgh runs the UK's second-largest financial centre, and its project roles have a distinctly regulated flavour: pensions, insurance and asset-management firms delivering compliance-heavy change, alongside two fast-growing fintech unicorn alumni and a public sector serving devolved government. Certified delivery professionals are in structurally short supply in Scotland, which shows in salaries and contract rates. PMP fits the financial programme world; Scrum credentials serve the tech scene spreading through the Exchange district and Leith. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule at early-morning to mid-afternoon UK hours — two days, whole workshop, afternoons free. Afterwards comes exam application support, mock exams calibrated to the real paper, and continued trainer availability for questions until you clear. Scottish financial-services employers typically reimburse the fee within one appraisal cycle of passing.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Edinburgh?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 04:30 AM – 01:30 PM GMT+1 in Edinburgh. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Edinburgh?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Edinburgh. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from United Kingdom?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in United Kingdom and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Edinburgh sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in United Kingdom accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Edinburgh — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Edinburgh: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
